sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 1442 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority; 1. For hearing of CMA No. 7238/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2025. Mr. Rashid Mehar, Advocate for Petitioner. Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, Advocate for Respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. ______________ Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of concerned Commissioner, which is taken on record; whereas, Petitioner’s Counsel submits that the Petitioner has preferred Revision Application against the Order of suspension under Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. When confronted, Respondent’s Counsel submits that the Revision Application will be decided. Accordingly, let Revision Application, filed by the Petitioner, be decided within three days’ time from today in accordance with law and after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner. If Petitioner is aggrieved, they may seek further remedy in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with pending application(s) ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Ayaz
